personas.name: Sarah
personas.role: Filing a confidential workplace conduct report

personas.name: James
personas.role: Receives and reviews confidential cases from Employee Relations queue

personas.name: Slackbot
personas.role: Processes reports, detects sensitive content, routes confidentially to ER

content.text: I need to file a confidential report.
I'm sorry to hear that. I want to assure you that your concern will be handled with complete confidentiality and care. Please select the category that best matches your concern.
Your selection "{{selectedChoice}}" has been registered. Please describe what you would like to report. Your report will be handled with sensitivity and confidentiality.

My manager Robert has been making demeaning comments during our 1:1s. He compares my performance unfavorably to other team members by name and says things like "Why can't you be more like Sam?" He's also interrupted me in team meetings to correct me in front of everyone. I've felt belittled and anxious going to work. This has been going on for about three months.

Thank you for sharing this with us. I've detected that your report contains sensitive keywords related to workplace conduct. I'm flagging this case as **confidential** and routing it only to our Employee Relations team.

No notifications will be sent to Robert or your department. Your report has been submitted. An ER Lead will review your case and reach out to you directly. You can check the status anytime by messaging me here.
Sarah has submitted a report regarding workplace conduct.

caseFields.label: Routing
caseFields.value: ER queue only — no notifications to subject or department
